parents.subject: LU-11074 mdc: set correct body eadatasize for getxattr()

commit.subject: LU-10699 osd: add update methods to DT index API
commit.message:
LU-10699 osd: add update methods to DT index API

Add in-place update methods dt_update() and dt_declare_update() to the
DT index API. Implement these methods for IAM ldiskfs and ZFS indexes.

Signed-off-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
Change-Id: I5b0f43aaa0d7e60b0190da0e484765df4ca2ea7a
